evals.prompt: Convert the file report.md to a Word document
evals.expected_output: A .docx file named report.docx is created with proper Chinese formatting (SimSun for body, SimHei for headings, Times New Roman for English)
expectations: The output file has proper Chinese font formatting

evals.prompt: I need to convert my Markdown file input.md to output.docx
evals.expected_output: A .docx file named output.docx is created from input.md
expectations: The script is called with both input and output file paths
The output file is named output.docx

evals.prompt: Generate the Word document from the default markdown file
evals.expected_output: The default file 技术可行性报告正文.md is converted to 技术可行性报告正文.docx
expectations: The script looks for the default markdown file
If found, converts it to .docx format
Reports the location of the generated file

evals.prompt: Convert this markdown to Word format with proper Chinese fonts
evals.expected_output: The markdown file is converted with SimSun (宋体) for body text and SimHei (黑体) for headings
expectations: The conversion applies Chinese typography standards
English text uses Times New Roman
